Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}This one's pretty old, so the art's got a retro feel to it. Guess it's s'posed to feel nostalgic, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The main character's got thick, seaweed eyebrows. Hey, what do you think of these old classics?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 21 2 3}{f 4 23 0 3 4 25 25}'Cause the eyebrows look like seaweed, and... And seaweed tastes good? Why're you makin' me explain it!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oho, I had no idea you were such a trendy fella.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The style matters, sure, but the way it inspires people never changes, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I hear ya, though. The best manga know exactly how to light a fire in your heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}Bottom of the ninth, two outs, bases loaded, and a home run'll change it all... The hero's in a real pickle![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Hey, you'd better read faster or else I'm gonna spoil it for ya![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Damn, this is where it ends? I should've borrowed more volumes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}It gets even crazier than this if I remember right. And man, the main character's rival...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The young hero's dedication[n]filled me with {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I'll borrow the rest of 'em so we can pick it up next time. Well, I'm gonna hit the hay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Man, our hero took an underdog baseball team that didn't even have enough players all the way to nationals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}No matter how tough the rival or desperate the situation, the hero always ends up findin' a way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey, we're technically a team too, aren't we? Means we need a hotshot of our own, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Haha, don't sweat it. We've already got ourselves a major hotshot—me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Everyone else has got their own strengths, kinda like the characters in a manga.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Haha, sounds an awful lot like hero talk to me. Share some of that glory, why don't ya?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hotshot or not, the others've got so much personality, kinda like the characters in a manga.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Oh yeah? That not realistic enough for ya?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But don't ya think Sanada-san and Kirijo-senpai have way more personality than any manga character?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Either way, kinda blows that real life can't be like how it is in a manga.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Oh yeah, that's right. Just before the big game, the hero collapses![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}All after gettin' everyone together, trainin' like crazy, becomin' a hotshot hitter, and carryin' the whole team all by himself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The young hero's dedication[n]filled me with {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Dyin' to know what happens next, huh? Then I'll borrow the rest of the volumes from my buddy, pronto![n]{f 1 1}
